    <h3 {...{

        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`before`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`Editable`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Optional. The editable before which the moved editable should be inserted. If not provided, the editable will be added at the end of the container`}</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <p>{`Returns: `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Promise<void>`}</inlineCode>{` - A promise that resolves when the editable has been moved`}</p>
    <p>{`Example: `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`await guestConnection.host.editorActions.move(editable, newContainer, beforeEditable);`}</inlineCode></p>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
